items.title: Deputy City Manager presentation on City-owned Property
items.summary: Deputy City Manager Kathy Watkins transmitted a presentation about City-owned property to frame a Roundtable/Working Meeting on the best future uses of those properties and the processes used to redevelop them. The Council received the presentation as part of the working session; no formal vote was taken.
items.body:
A communication was received from Deputy City Manager, Kathy Watkins, transmitting a presentation regarding City-owned Property.
COF 2026-54

history.action: Presented at Roundtable/Working Meeting on best future uses of City-owned properties and associated redevelopment processes

rationale.doc.kind:COF: Section 'COMMUNICATIONS FROM OTHER CITY OFFICERS' on both agenda and final actions
rationale.doc.item_id:cof-2026-54: Bold ID line 'COF 2026-54' at end of entry
rationale.doc.meeting_date:2026-04-06: Cover page lists 'APRIL 06, 2026' as the meeting date (filename publish date is April 7)
rationale.geo.scope:citywide: City-owned properties discussed at a citywide policy level; no specific neighborhood named
rationale.topic.area:housing_zoning: Roundtable purpose is 'best future uses of City-owned properties and associated redevelopment processes' — land use / redevelopment frame

items.title: Awaiting Report on best future uses for City-owned properties accepted
items.summary: An Awaiting Report (originally #31842) directing City staff to prepare a Council discussion on the best future uses of City-owned properties and the processes for redevelopment. Listed in the Final Actions for this Roundtable meeting and accepted at the April 13, 2026 Roundtable meeting.
items.body:
Work with relevant departments to prepare for a Council discussion on best future uses for City-owned properties and the processes for redevelopment. Original Awaiting Report #31842
Accepted in Council Roundtable meeting April 13, 2026
AR 2026-10

history.action: Listed in Final Actions for Roundtable/Working Meeting on City-owned properties

rationale.doc.meeting_date:2026-04-06: Cover page lists 'APRIL 06, 2026' as the meeting date
rationale.geo.scope:citywide: Concerns City-owned properties as a category, with no specific site named
